name: Minimal blueprint
description: The smallest valid v1 blueprint: one catalogue pattern node, no edges, no extension dependency. blueprintVersion must be the integer 1; id must be lowercase-with-hyphens; nodes must be non-empty; edges must be present (an empty list is fine). Every node carries a `pins` key, even empty: without it the file is treated as a Studio draft and re-projected.

nodes.label: Orchestrator
nodes.description: kind `pattern` points at a catalogue pattern id (three uppercase letters, a dash, two digits). This node is unconnected, so its pins list is empty; as soon as you add edges, declare one pin per contract with `id`, `direction` (in|out) and `contract`.
